            Thag 1:110  Usabha
            
              Trees on the hilltops
              are flourishing,
              watered by a new high-rising cloud,
              giving birth to even more goodness
              for Usabha—
              desiring seclusion,
              conscious of
              “wilderness.”
            
            See also: MN 121
